memoryArtifacts.headline: Notes for Sir Henry Dwinn and Margaret Wogan
memoryArtifacts.description:
Notes for Margaret Wogan:
The Wogan line of Picton ended in an heiress who married Owain Dwnn, and the Dwnns in turn, ended in an heiress, Jane, who in the late 15th century married Sir Thomas of Clis …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Dwnn於1440年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特時，他的父親Owain Dwnn48歲，母親Catherine Wogan23歲。他於大約1453年與Margaret Wogan在威爾士布洛可爾皮可頓結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年7月26日在英國奧可福爾班波瑞享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Dwnn于1440年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特时，他的父亲Owain Dwnn48岁，母亲Catherine Wogan23岁。他于大约1453年与Margaret Wogan在威尔士布洛可爾皮可頓结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1469年7月26日在英国奧可福爾班波瑞享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dwnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Dinh, Hoa, Trang.
Irish (Tipperary): probably a variant of Scottish Din 6, from a short form of the personal name Dinis, a variant of Dennis .

variants.name: Din
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Munir, Riaz, Akbar, Anwar, Ashraf, Ghulam, Mohammad, Salah, Shahid, Tariq, Zahir, Abdul.  Indian Amrit, Gulab, Hemant, Jitendra, Mohi, Neena, Shingara.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from the Arabic personal name Dīn, from dīn ‘religion’, or a shortened form of any of the many Arabic names formed with the same word, for example Saifuddin ‘sword of religion’ or Salahuddin ‘righteousness of religion’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Dwnn was born in 1440, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Owain Dwnn, was 48 and his mother, Catherine Wogan, was 23. He married Margaret Wogan about 1453, in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 26 July 1469, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Dwnn est né en 1440, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain Dwnn, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Catherine Wogan, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wogan environ 1453, à Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1469, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

Er hat um 1453 in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales Margaret Wogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1469 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Dwnn(이)가 1440년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain Dwnn(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Wogan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1453년 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴에서 Margaret Wogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 7월 26일 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Dwnn nasceu em 1440, em Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain Dwnn, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Wogan, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wogan aproximadamente 1453, em Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1469, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Dwnn родился в 1440 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Owain Dwnn было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Wogan, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wogan около 1453 г. в местности пиктон, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 26 июля 1469 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.
